feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Les supporters quittent quand même le Parc des Princes en chantant - Foot - C1 - PSG

link.title: Les supporters quittent quand même le Parc des Princes en chantant - Foot - C1 - PSG

entry.content: VIDÉO FOOT - Malgré la défaite de leur équipe face au Bayern Munich, en finale de la Ligue des champions, les supporters parisiens présents au Parc des Princes ont quitté le stade en donnant de la voix.
entry.summary: VIDÉO FOOT - Malgré la défaite de leur équipe face au Bayern Munich, en finale de la Ligue des champions, les supporters parisiens présents au Parc des Princes ont quitté le stade en donnant de la voix.

entry.title: ‘He’s put himself back into a lot of people’s thoughts’: The Roar podcast on Will Grigg

link.title: ‘He’s put himself back into a lot of people’s thoughts’: The Roar podcast on Will Grigg

entry.content:
Phil Smith and Mark Donnelly are back in this preview from the bonus August 24 edition to discuss Sunderland’s return to action, transfer targets and the club’s upcoming friendlies.
The Black Cats were back with a bang on Saturday August 22 as they beat Gateshead 3-1, and we cast our eye over the win and the standout performances from the game - including that of Will Grigg.
We also turn our attentions to the transfer front, looking at incomings, trialists and the Benji Kimpioka saga.
You can listen to the podcast via Spotify, Apple Podcasts, Anchor or Soundcloud - as well as a host of other podcast providers.
entry.summary: Phil Smith and Mark Donnelly are back in this preview from the bonus August 24 edition to discuss Sunderland’s return to action, transfer targets and the club’s upcoming friendlies. The Black Cats were back with a bang on Saturday August 22 as they beat Gateshead 3-1, and we cast our eye over the win and the standout performances from the game - including that of Will Grigg. We also turn our attentions to the transfer front, looking at incomings, trialists and the Benji Kimpioka saga. You can listen to the podcast via Spotify, Apple Podcasts, Anchor or Soundcloud - as well as a host of other podcast providers.

entry.title: Corona Crisis: केंद्र सरकार ने Vehicles के इन Documents की बढ़ाई वैलिडिटी वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Corona Crisis: केंद्र सरकार ने Vehicles के इन Documents की बढ़ाई वैलिडिटी वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Corona crisis: Central Govt gives relief to vehicle owners, increase validity of these documents. The central government has decided to increase the validity of documents such as driving license, fitness, registration certificate, pollution certificate related to motor vehicle by 31 December 2020, giving great relief to the common people in the midst of Corona crisis.
केंद्र सरकार ने कोरोना संकट के बीच आम लोगों को बड़ी राहत देते हुए मोटर व्‍हीकल से जुड़े ड्राइविंग लाइसेंस, फिटनेस, रजिस्‍ट्रेशन सर्टिफिकेट, पॉल्‍यूशन सर्टिफिकेट जैसे डाक्यूमेंट की वैलिडिटी 31 दिसंबर 2020 तक बढ़ाने का फैसला लिया है.
#Corona #MotorVehicle #VehiclesDocuments
entry.summary: Corona crisis: Central Govt gives relief to vehicle owners, increase validity of these documents. The central government has decided to increase the validity of documents such as driving license, fitness, registration certificate, pollution certificate related to motor vehicle by 31 December 2020, giving great relief to the common people in the midst of Corona crisis. केंद्र सरकार ने कोरोना संकट के बीच आम लोगों को बड़ी राहत देते हुए मोटर व्‍हीकल से जुड़े ड्राइविंग लाइसेंस, फिटनेस, रजिस्‍ट्रेशन सर्टिफिकेट, पॉल्‍यूशन सर्टिफिकेट जैसे डाक्यूमेंट की वैलिडिटी 31 दिसंबर 2020 तक बढ़ाने का फैसला लिया है. #Corona #MotorVehicle #VehiclesDocuments

entry.title: Dr. Carl Hart Debunks Drug Myths

link.title: Dr. Carl Hart Debunks Drug Myths

entry.content: Scientist Dr. Carl Hart helps debunk (and confirm!) some common myths about drugs. Dr. Hart has spent his career researching the effects of drugs on the body and is here to help us understand some common misunderstandings. Is marijuana really a gateway drug? Is the opioid crisis getting worse? Are drugs more addictive than alcohol?
entry.summary: Scientist Dr. Carl Hart helps debunk (and confirm!) some common myths about drugs. Dr. Hart has spent his career researching the effects of drugs on the body and is here to help us understand some common misunderstandings. Is marijuana really a gateway drug? Is the opioid crisis getting worse? Are drugs more addictive than alcohol?

entry.title: Huancayo: mujer sacó a correazos a menor que se había escondido bajo cama de su hija

link.title: Huancayo: mujer sacó a correazos a menor que se había escondido bajo cama de su hija

entry.content: Ante la mirada de militares y policías, la madre desató su furia contra el adolescente, que era enamorado de la joven.
entry.summary: Ante la mirada de militares y policías, la madre desató su furia contra el adolescente, que era enamorado de la joven.

entry.title: Burcu Yeşilbaş - Romana Ρωμάνα (Official Video)

link.title: Burcu Yeşilbaş - Romana Ρωμάνα (Official Video)

entry.content:
Burcu Yeşilbaş’ın yeni tekli çalışması "Romana (Ρωμάνα )" sounderland etiketiyle tüm dijital platformlarda.
Youtube Burcu Yeşilbaş Seçme Şarkılar İçin Tıklayın:
Spotify Burcu Yeşilbaş Seçme Şarkılar İçin Tıklayın:
Söz - Müzik: Anonim
Düzenleme: Levent Canen
Yönetmen: Burcu Yeşilbaş
Kamera: Burcu Yeşilbaş, Reyhan Yıldırım
Kemençe: Yunus Emre Kurt
Gitar: Altuğ Coşkun
Bas Gitar: Tuğbay Yağcı
Davul: Burak Taşdemir
Mandolin: Hüsamettin Küçük
Klarnet: Sarper Aksoy
Bu klip Tonya’nın Kadıralak Yaylası’nda çekilmiştir. Son zamanlarda Kadıralak Yaylası turistlere yani "Araplara" satılmaya çalışılıyor. Buna halk olarak karşı geleceğimizi bu kliple, emekçi kadınlarımızla duyurmak istedik, o yüzden klibin sonuna #kadıralakhalkındır hashtagi koyduk.
Yaylamızı ranta karşı savunacağız.
#KADIRALAKHALKINDIR
#Kadıralak
#KadıralakHalkındır
Abone Olmak İçin:
Instagram:
Facebook:
Twitter:
I Tunes:
Spotify:
Deezer:
Muud:
Fizy:
Ρωμάνα (Lyrics)
Ρωμάνα επαρχάρευεν
Κουντούρ’ ’ς σα λειβαδία
’Σ σου Μύριν και ’ς σου Κόβλακαν,
Και στ’ άσπρα τα πλακίαν
Ρωμάνα ξαν ρωμάνα
Του παρχαρί η μάννα
Τιδέν ’κι φοβερίζ’ äτεν
Απές σ’ αγρä τ’ ορμάνâ
ρωμάνα τρώει το βούτουρον
Τ’ αθόγαλαν το στύπον
Φτερία στρών’ και κείται ’κα
Χορτάζ’ ελαφρίν ύπνον
Ρωμάνα ξαν ρωμάνα
Του παρχαρί η μάννα
Τιδέν ’κι φοβερίζ’ äτεν
Απές σ’ αγρä τ’ ορμάνâ
ρωμάνες πάτε ’ς σον παρχάρ’
καλά δουλείας ποίστεν
όντες τρώτε τ’ αθόγαλαν
το μερτικό μ’ αφήσ’τεν
Ρωμάνα ξαν ρωμάνα
Του παρχαρί η μάννα
Τιδέν ’κι φοβερίζ’ äτεν
Απές σ’ αγρä τ’ ορμάνâ
Romana (Lyrics / Şarkı Sözleri) Türkçe Çeviri
Romana yayla yaptı
Kuntur’un vadilerinde
Mirin’in ve Kavlaka’nın
Ve beyaz pilakilerde
Romana hep Romana
Yaylaların annesi
Onu kimse korkutamaz
Vahşi ormanlar içinde
entry.summary: Burcu Yeşilbaş’ın yeni tekli çalışması "Romana (Ρωμάνα )" sounderland etiketiyle tüm dijital platformlarda. Youtube Burcu Yeşilbaş Seçme Şarkılar İçin Tıklayın: Spotify Burcu Yeşilbaş Seçme Şarkılar İçin Tıklayın: Söz - Müzik: Anonim Düzenleme: Levent Canen Yönetmen: Burcu Yeşilbaş Kamera: Burcu Yeşilbaş, Reyhan Yıldırım Kemençe: Yunus Emre Kurt Gitar: Altuğ Coşkun Bas Gitar: Tuğbay Yağcı Davul: Burak Taşdemir Mandolin: Hüsamettin Küçük Klarnet: Sarper Aksoy Bu klip Tonya’nın Kadıralak Yaylası’nda çekilmiştir. Son zamanlarda Kadıralak Yaylası turistlere yani "Araplara" satılmaya çalışılıyor. Buna halk olarak karşı geleceğimizi bu kliple, emekçi kadınlarımızla duyurmak istedik, o yüzden klibin sonuna #kadıralakhalkındır hashtagi koyduk. Yaylamızı ranta karşı savunacağız. #KADIRALAKHALKINDIR #Kadıralak #KadıralakHalkındır Abone Olmak İçin: Instagram: Facebook: Twitter: I Tunes: Spotify: Deezer: Muud: Fizy: Ρωμάνα (Lyrics) Ρωμάνα επαρχάρευεν Κουντούρ’ ’ς σα λειβαδία ’Σ σου Μύριν και ’ς σου Κόβλακαν, Και στ’ άσπρα τα πλακίαν Ρωμάνα ξαν ρωμάνα Του παρχαρί η μάννα Τιδέν ’κι φοβερίζ’ äτεν Απές σ’ αγρä τ’ ορμάνâ ρωμάνα τρώει το βούτουρον Τ’ αθόγαλαν το στύπον Φτερία στρών’ και κείται ’κα Χορτάζ’ ελαφρίν ύπνον Ρωμάνα ξαν ρωμάνα Του παρχαρί η μάννα Τιδέν ’κι φοβερίζ’ äτεν Απές σ’ αγρä τ’ ορμάνâ ρωμάνες πάτε ’ς σον παρχάρ’ καλά δουλείας ποίστεν όντες τρώτε τ’ αθόγαλαν το μερτικό μ’ αφήσ’τεν Ρωμάνα ξαν ρωμάνα Του παρχαρί η μάννα Τιδέν ’κι φοβερίζ’ äτεν Απές σ’ αγρä τ’ ορμάνâ Romana (Lyrics / Şarkı Sözleri) Türkçe Çeviri Romana yayla yaptı Kuntur’un vadilerinde Mirin’in ve Kavlaka’nın Ve beyaz pilakilerde Romana hep Romana Yaylaların annesi Onu kimse korkutamaz Vahşi ormanlar içinde

entry.title: Xfinity Report: Cardinals’ Roel Ramirez’s MLB Debut Did Not Go As Planned

link.title: Xfinity Report: Cardinals’ Roel Ramirez’s MLB Debut Did Not Go As Planned

entry.content: St Louis. Cardinals rookie Roel Ramirez probably won’t look back at his MLB Debut as a fond memory. Meredith Gorman breaks down the youngster’s tough night in the Xfinity Report.
entry.summary: St Louis. Cardinals rookie Roel Ramirez probably won’t look back at his MLB Debut as a fond memory. Meredith Gorman breaks down the youngster’s tough night in the Xfinity Report.

entry.title: Top 10 Best Music Videos of 2020 (So Far)

link.title: Top 10 Best Music Videos of 2020 (So Far)

entry.content: When you pair a song with the right visuals, the result can be truly astounding. For this list, we’ll be looking at the most unique, impressive, creative and rewatchable music videos of 2020 released up until now.
entry.summary: When you pair a song with the right visuals, the result can be truly astounding. For this list, we’ll be looking at the most unique, impressive, creative and rewatchable music videos of 2020 released up until now.

entry.title: Telangana Fire: Srisailam Hydroelectric Plant में लगी भीषण आग वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Telangana Fire: Srisailam Hydroelectric Plant में लगी भीषण आग वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Fire broke out at Left Bank Power House in Srisailam, in Telangana side, late last night. Fire engine from Atmakur Fire Station, Kurnool deployed. Ten people rescued, of which 6 are under treatment at a hospital in Srisailam. Nine people still feared trapped. Telangana Minister G Jagadeeshwar Reddy said, Fire broke out in unit 1 around 10:30PM. Ten people were able to come out. Plant’s Power supply was cut off.Priority is to rescue the trapped
तेलंगाना में नगरकुरनूल के श्रीशैलम लेफ्ट बैंक पावर स्टेशन में गुरुवार रात को भीषण आग लग गई. स्टेशन से अब तक 10 लोगों को निकाला जा चुका, जिसमें से 6 लोगों को गंभीर हालत में अस्पताल में भर्ती कराया गया है. जबकि 9 लोगों के अभी स्टेशन के अंदर फंसे होने की खबर है. दमकल की गाड़ियां मौके पर पहुंच चुकी हैं. एनडीआरएफ की टीम को बुलाया गया है. आग बुझाने के साथ साथ अंदर फंसे लोगों को बचाने की कोशिश की जा रही है.
#Telangana #SrisailamPowerStationFire #LeftBankPowerHouseFire
entry.summary: Fire broke out at Left Bank Power House in Srisailam, in Telangana side, late last night. Fire engine from Atmakur Fire Station, Kurnool deployed. Ten people rescued, of which 6 are under treatment at a hospital in Srisailam. Nine people still feared trapped. Telangana Minister G Jagadeeshwar Reddy said, Fire broke out in unit 1 around 10:30PM. Ten people were able to come out. Plant’s Power supply was cut off.Priority is to rescue the trapped तेलंगाना में नगरकुरनूल के श्रीशैलम लेफ्ट बैंक पावर स्टेशन में गुरुवार रात को भीषण आग लग गई. स्टेशन से अब तक 10 लोगों को निकाला जा चुका, जिसमें से 6 लोगों को गंभीर हालत में अस्पताल में भर्ती कराया गया है. जबकि 9 लोगों के अभी स्टेशन के अंदर फंसे होने की खबर है. दमकल की गाड़ियां मौके पर पहुंच चुकी हैं. एनडीआरएफ की टीम को बुलाया गया है. आग बुझाने के साथ साथ अंदर फंसे लोगों को बचाने की कोशिश की जा रही है. #Telangana #SrisailamPowerStationFire #LeftBankPowerHouseFire

entry.title: Finale - Séville remporte son 6e trophée

link.title: Finale - Séville remporte son 6e trophée

entry.content: Le Séville FC a renversé l’Inter Milan ce vendredi à Cologne pour remporter sa sixième Ligue Europa en six finales disputées (3-2).
entry.summary: Le Séville FC a renversé l’Inter Milan ce vendredi à Cologne pour remporter sa sixième Ligue Europa en six finales disputées (3-2).

entry.title: 2020 Billboard Latin Music Awards: The Full List of Finalists Billboard News

link.title: 2020 Billboard Latin Music Awards: The Full List of Finalists Billboard News

entry.content: Billboard’s Latin Music Week, which will celebrate its 30th anniversary this year, will stream live Oct. 20-23, featuring conversations with a roster of artists, including Ozuna, Rosalía, Maluma, Black Eyed Peas and Carlos Vives, among others.
entry.summary: Billboard’s Latin Music Week, which will celebrate its 30th anniversary this year, will stream live Oct. 20-23, featuring conversations with a roster of artists, including Ozuna, Rosalía, Maluma, Black Eyed Peas and Carlos Vives, among others.

entry.title: Southsea Vigil

link.title: Southsea Vigil

entry.content: People gathered on Southsea beach to show their respects for refugee, Abdulfatah Hamdallah, who tragically drowned crossing the Channel. The group also hoped to raise the issue of the plight of thousands of refugees having to risk their lives in search of asylum.
entry.summary: People gathered on Southsea beach to show their respects for refugee, Abdulfatah Hamdallah, who tragically drowned crossing the Channel. The group also hoped to raise the issue of the plight of thousands of refugees having to risk their lives in search of asylum.

entry.title: Almost 3 billion animals affected by Australian bushfires – video report

link.title: Almost 3 billion animals affected by Australian bushfires – video report

entry.content: Nearly 3 billion animals have been killed or displaced by the devastating 2019-2020 bushfire season, according to scientists who have revealed for the first time the scale of the impact on the country’s native wildlife. An estimated 143 million mammals, 180 million birds, 51 million frogs and a staggering 2.5 billion reptiles were affected by the fires that burned millions of hectares across Australia.
entry.summary: Nearly 3 billion animals have been killed or displaced by the devastating 2019-2020 bushfire season, according to scientists who have revealed for the first time the scale of the impact on the country’s native wildlife. An estimated 143 million mammals, 180 million birds, 51 million frogs and a staggering 2.5 billion reptiles were affected by the fires that burned millions of hectares across Australia.

entry.title: Bond legend Sean Connery turns 90 years old

link.title: Bond legend Sean Connery turns 90 years old

entry.content: Film legend, Sean Connery is celebrating his 90th birthday. The Scottish Bond has had an incredible career spanning over seven decades. Report by Jonesl. Like us on Facebook at and follow us on Twitter at
entry.summary: Film legend, Sean Connery is celebrating his 90th birthday. The Scottish Bond has had an incredible career spanning over seven decades. Report by Jonesl. Like us on Facebook at and follow us on Twitter at

entry.title: Maddy Ane Madhav Muchattaina Moovannela Janda Mana India Song

link.title: Maddy Ane Madhav Muchattaina Moovannela Janda Mana India Song

entry.content:
Maddy (Ane) Madhav Movie And Independence Day Special Song Released
#MaddyAneMadhav
#MaddyEngiraMadhavan
#Tollywood
#Kollywood
#Panindia
తెలుగు సహా తమిళం, మలమాళం, కన్నడ, హిందీ భాషల్లో ఆన్మే క్రియేషన్స్‌ పతాకంపై అనిల్‌కుమార్‌ నిర్మిస్తున్న పాన్‌ ఇండియా ఫిల్మ్‌ ‘మ్యాడి అనే మాధవ్‌’. తమిళంలో ‘మ్యాడి ఎంగిర మాధవన్‌’, హిందీలో ‘మేరా ఇండియా’గా విడుదల చేయనున్నారు. స్వాతంత్య్ర దినోత్సవం సందర్భంగా శనివారం ఈ సినిమాలో ‘ముచ్చటైన మువ్వన్నెల జెండా…’ పాటతో పాటు తెలుగు వెర్షన్‌ ఫస్ట్‌ లుక్‌ విడుదల చేశారు. నిర్మాత అనిల్‌కుమార్‌ కథ అందించిన ఈ చిత్రంతో ప్రతీష్‌ దీపు దర్శకుడిగా పరిచయం అవుతున్నారు
entry.summary: Maddy (Ane) Madhav Movie And Independence Day Special Song Released #MaddyAneMadhav #MaddyEngiraMadhavan #Tollywood #Kollywood #Panindia తెలుగు సహా తమిళం, మలమాళం, కన్నడ, హిందీ భాషల్లో ఆన్మే క్రియేషన్స్‌ పతాకంపై అనిల్‌కుమార్‌ నిర్మిస్తున్న పాన్‌ ఇండియా ఫిల్మ్‌ ‘మ్యాడి అనే మాధవ్‌’. తమిళంలో ‘మ్యాడి ఎంగిర మాధవన్‌’, హిందీలో ‘మేరా ఇండియా’గా విడుదల చేయనున్నారు. స్వాతంత్య్ర దినోత్సవం సందర్భంగా శనివారం ఈ సినిమాలో ‘ముచ్చటైన మువ్వన్నెల జెండా…’ పాటతో పాటు తెలుగు వెర్షన్‌ ఫస్ట్‌ లుక్‌ విడుదల చేశారు. నిర్మాత అనిల్‌కుమార్‌ కథ అందించిన ఈ చిత్రంతో ప్రతీష్‌ దీపు దర్శకుడిగా పరిచయం అవుతున్నారు

entry.content:

Homem fica em estado grave ao sofrer queimaduras com gasolina em São Salvador

entry.content: El Agente 47 viaja a Inglaterra a resolver un crimen en una familia aristócrata, y también para cometer un asesinato.
entry.summary: El Agente 47 viaja a Inglaterra a resolver un crimen en una familia aristócrata, y también para cometer un asesinato.

entry.title: Internet Gratis Disediakan Untuk Siswa Kurang Mampu

link.title: Internet Gratis Disediakan Untuk Siswa Kurang Mampu

entry.content:
MAKASSAR, KOMPAS.TV - Personel brimob polda sulawesi selatan menyediakan empat posko internet gratis untuk membantu siswa kurang mampu mengikuti proses belajar secara daring. Keberadaan posko internet gratis inipun dimanfaatkan sejumlah siswa untuk belajar.
Empat posko internet gratis ini berada di mako brimob polda sulawesi selatan di jalan sultan alauddin makassar sulawesi selatan. Setiap posko dibatasi menampung 10 hingga 12 siswa saja agar protokol kesehatan tetap diterapkan. Sementara personel brimob bergantian mengawasi siswa yang sedang belajar.
Keberadaan posko internet ini dimanfaatkan oleh sejumlah siswa kurang mampu mulai dari siswa taman kanak-kanak hingga siswa sekolah menengah atas. Orang tua siswa pun menyambut baik keberadaan posko ini lantaran dapat meringankan biaya internet.
Kehadiran empat posko internet gratis ini diadakan sebagai bentuk perhatian dan keprihatinan brimon terhada sejumlah siswa kurang mampu yang harus menjalani proses belajar daring.
Proses belajar daring ini memang telah dilakukan sejak sejumlah wilayah di indonesia menjadi zona merah sehingga seluruh aktivitas warga dibatasi termasuk proses belajar mengajar.
#INTERNETGERATIS
#BELAJARDARING
#BRIMOBPOLDASULSEL
entry.summary: MAKASSAR, KOMPAS.TV - Personel brimob polda sulawesi selatan menyediakan empat posko internet gratis untuk membantu siswa kurang mampu mengikuti proses belajar secara daring. Keberadaan posko internet gratis inipun dimanfaatkan sejumlah siswa untuk belajar. Empat posko internet gratis ini berada di mako brimob polda sulawesi selatan di jalan sultan alauddin makassar sulawesi selatan. Setiap posko dibatasi menampung 10 hingga 12 siswa saja agar protokol kesehatan tetap diterapkan. Sementara personel brimob bergantian mengawasi siswa yang sedang belajar. Keberadaan posko internet ini dimanfaatkan oleh sejumlah siswa kurang mampu mulai dari siswa taman kanak-kanak hingga siswa sekolah menengah atas. Orang tua siswa pun menyambut baik keberadaan posko ini lantaran dapat meringankan biaya internet. Kehadiran empat posko internet gratis ini diadakan sebagai bentuk perhatian dan keprihatinan brimon terhada sejumlah siswa kurang mampu yang harus menjalani proses belajar daring. Proses belajar daring ini memang telah dilakukan sejak sejumlah wilayah di indonesia menjadi zona merah sehingga seluruh aktivitas warga dibatasi termasuk proses belajar mengajar. #INTERNETGERATIS #BELAJARDARING #BRIMOBPOLDASULSEL

entry.title: Robles, sobre el acoso a Iglesias y Montero: ‘Estas intimidaciones no son aceptables’

link.title: Robles, sobre el acoso a Iglesias y Montero: ‘Estas intimidaciones no son aceptables’

entry.content: Un fin de semana más la ultraderecha acosa la vivienda del vicepresidente del Gobierno, Pablo Iglesias, y de la ministra de Igualdad, Irene Montero. Un hostigamiento que no cesa a pesar de las críticas del Gobierno que vuelve a pronunciarse sobre esta cuestión. En palabras de la ministra de Defensa, Margarita Robles, "el acosar a alguien por sus ideas políticas no lo puedo aceptar"
entry.summary: Un fin de semana más la ultraderecha acosa la vivienda del vicepresidente del Gobierno, Pablo Iglesias, y de la ministra de Igualdad, Irene Montero. Un hostigamiento que no cesa a pesar de las críticas del Gobierno que vuelve a pronunciarse sobre esta cuestión. En palabras de la ministra de Defensa, Margarita Robles, "el acosar a alguien por sus ideas políticas no lo puedo aceptar"

entry.title: JNTU కాలేజీకి వ‌ర్చువ‌ల్ విధానంలో CM Jagan శంకుస్థాప‌న! Oneindia Telugu

link.title: JNTU కాలేజీకి వ‌ర్చువ‌ల్ విధానంలో CM Jagan శంకుస్థాప‌న! Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
CM YS Jagan On Monday laid Foundation Stone through virtual mode from his camp office at tadepalli near for the construction of JNTU building complex at narsaraopet in Guntur district.
#CMJagan
#JNTU
#Narsaraopet
#Guntur
#YSRCP
#ChandrababuNaidu
#Tadepalli
#JNTUCollegebuildings
గుంటూరు జిల్లా నర‌స‌రావుపేట‌లోని జెఎన్‌టీయూ కాలేజీకి వ‌ర్చువ‌ల్ విధానంలో సీఎం వైయ‌స్ జ‌గ‌న్ శంకుస్థాప‌న చేశారు. తాడేప‌ల్లి లోని క్యాంపు కార్యాల‌యం నుంచి వీడియో కాన్ఫ‌రెన్స్ ద్వారా సీఎం వైయ‌స్ జ‌గ‌న్ మాట్లాడారు.
entry.summary: CM YS Jagan On Monday laid Foundation Stone through virtual mode from his camp office at tadepalli near for the construction of JNTU building complex at narsaraopet in Guntur district. #CMJagan #JNTU #Narsaraopet #Guntur #YSRCP #ChandrababuNaidu #Tadepalli #JNTUCollegebuildings గుంటూరు జిల్లా నర‌స‌రావుపేట‌లోని జెఎన్‌టీయూ కాలేజీకి వ‌ర్చువ‌ల్ విధానంలో సీఎం వైయ‌స్ జ‌గ‌న్ శంకుస్థాప‌న చేశారు. తాడేప‌ల్లి లోని క్యాంపు కార్యాల‌యం నుంచి వీడియో కాన్ఫ‌రెన్స్ ద్వారా సీఎం వైయ‌స్ జ‌గ‌న్ మాట్లాడారు.
